user_prompt: Delete the task "Delete Me Task", then restore it. Also try to delete a task that doesn't exist to confirm it errors.
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. Use delete_entity to soft-delete and restore_entity to revive entities, passing entity_id, entity_type, and a reason.
assistant_text: Deleted "Delete Me Task" then restored it — it's live again. Deleting a non-existent task returned a 404 not-found error, as expected.
